text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Teio, that parcel you're holding... Could it be that
you remembered my birthday? ♪

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
You got it! I randomly grabbed a heap of snacks
you like and stuffed them into this pouch!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: You picked them at random?! How irresponsible...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Hey, just so you know, I did a whole bunch of
thinking at first, but nothing came to mind.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: I mean, I already give you so much.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
You see, I'm always training, stressing, and
getting stronger just so I can race you. That's
why...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
It's kind of like I'm already giving presents to you
every day. Can't beat that, right?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I understand now. Indeed... that is a lot of effort
on your part. All the same, I do hope that you've
prepared yourself for what's to come.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I've no intention of giving back any presents I've
received. As such, I think I'll have you run
alongside me for the foreseeable future—no
matter the season, nor how much time passes.
